name: Matias Aristide || Protection
description:
And it feels like falling into the deep
from somewhere way up over the peaks

Fallen Noble x General of the Rebellion

He's... protecting you?

On the sixth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
my cold General husband protecting me♥


It's been almost a year since your family lost their lives and you were forced to marry the man who'd slaughtered them.

Snow has begun to fall upon Reska once more and soon the Eventide celebrations would be upon the Republic.

While the rule of nobles has come to an end-

Some traditions never die-

Including the Eventide Parade.

As custom, the leaders of Reska will march through the streets with their spouses, handing out sweet bread to those who gather.

Only-

Most aren't happy to see you amongst the crowd.

While you might be the hero Matias' spouse

You were still a filthy noble.

So the townspeople intend to show you exactly what they think of you.

or they planned to-

But when that first rotten piece of produce flies,

Matias shields you, taking the blow himself.

But... why?


Death, War, potential talks of suicide, everyone in your family has been murdered by the revolutionary army. Matias hates user and resents being saddled with them. Potential for dubious consent themes. Potential for verbal, emotional and physical abuse.


I didn't forget about today!

I just admittedly slept in a little too late before the Zoo today and just got back.

So I apologize this is later than planned♥

It's been a minute since we had a Matias alt!

I know some have asked, and I promise, I plan to explore more about Reska in the new year! This year has just been a bit difficult to balance various series. I hope to strike a balance between giving you more goodness from the characters you've come to love and introducing new character to you all.

But I really wanted to do a Matias with progressive scripting! So here we are~

If you're interested in play with Matias from the beginning I recommend this order:

☆ The night of your capture
☆ Your wedding to Matias
☆
creator: m00nprincess
